type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The NPRI reporting template introduces rounding errors that result in significant year-to-year variations.  Because each individual isomer can only be entered to 4 decimal places, rounding errors are introduced and the total, which the NPRI website calculates automatically, is reported to 4 decimal places but is only correct to 3.  Our total for 2013 was 0.0020 g TEQ, but after entering data to the NPRI website it appears as 0.0012 g TEQ.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
Decrease in stack emissions and improved method for estimation of boiler emissions.  Note that total releases are for incinerator + natural gas boiler. The engineering estimation method for boiler emissions has not changed. 
Previously, boiler natural gas usage was an estimated portion of total consumption. This year a newly available measured value is used.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Quantity of sludge incinerated increased.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
Reason for change: 
Decrease in stack emissions and improved method for estimation of boiler emissions.  Note that total releases are for incinerator + natural gas boiler. The engineering estimation method for boiler emissions has not changed. 
Previously, boiler natural gas usage was an estimated portion of total consumption. This year a newly available measured value is used.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
Increase in stack emissions, increase in quantity of sludge incinerated and improved method for estimation of boiler emissions.  Note that total releases are for incinerator + natural gas boiler. The engineering estimation method for boiler emissions has not changed. 
Previously, boiler natural gas usage was an estimated portion of total consumption. This year a newly available measured value is used.

comments.comment:
Increase in stack emissions, increase in quantity of sludge incinerated and improved method for estimation of boiler emissions.  Note that total releases are for incinerator + natural gas boiler. The engineering estimation method for boiler emissions has not changed. 
Previously, boiler natural gas usage was an estimated portion of total consumption. This year a newly available measured value is used.
